title: Front-End Web Developer

**Benefits**

* Collaborative, high\\-performance, globally distributed team environment

title: Software Engineer - Frontend
description:
**About Zamp:** 




  





**Mission \\-** 




  





 Zamp is not a company, we’re a
 **humanity catalyst** 
 . We’re on a mission to enable people to move at the speed of thought.
 



  





 This decade, we’re focused on building digital employees for the future of work, unlocking human creativity at a scale the world has never seen. We work with 50\\+ top global organizations and banks (including DoorDash, Uber, and Stripe) with billions in revenue. We raised a $22M seed round in 2022 from Sequoia Capital, Dara Khosrowshahi (CEO, Uber), Tony Xu (CEO, DoorDash), and other global leaders.
 



  





 One aspect of our purpose is to build what we believe to be the world’s best team, passionate, authentic, and relentlessly curious people who want to do their life’s best work, learn as much as possible, and create outsized impact.
 



  





 Hear more from our founders on our company
 **here** 
 .
 



  





**Role Overview:**

With the right mix of expertise and creativity, this team is the unseen magicians who add a dash of tech wizardry to make Zamp’s products shine.
 



 From coding late into the night to brainstorming over a cup of coffee, we are always on a mission to make our technology stand out. We are not just the engineering team but the tech superheroes that keep Zamp at the forefront of innovation.
 



  





**What you'll do:** 




  




* Design and develop high\\-quality, scalable, and performant frontend solutions using modern web technologies.
* Collaborate with product managers, UX/UI designers, and backend engineers to translate requirements and designs into functional, user\\-centric interfaces.
* Serve as a technical expert in frontend development, staying updated on industry trends, best practices, and emerging technologies.
* Drive continuous improvement in development processes, code quality, and front\\-end architecture.
* Work with cross\\-functional teams to define and implement standards, best practices, and coding conventions.
* Perform performance optimisations to enhance application speed, responsiveness, and scalability.
* Champion usability and accessibility standards
 **,** 
 ensuring applications are intuitive and inclusive for all users.
* Monitor user feedback and conduct user testing to make data\\-driven UI/UX improvements.
* Stay aligned with project timelines and consistently deliver high\\-quality work within deadlines.



  





**Qualifications Required:** 




  




* 3\\-6 years of experience as a Frontend Engineer, with a strong track record of delivering high\\-quality frontend solutions
* Proficiency in web technologies such as HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frontend frameworks like React, Angular, or Vue.js.
* Deep understanding of frontend architecture, design patterns, and best practices.
* Strong knowledge of responsive design principles and cross\\-browser compatibility.
* Experience with version control systems (e.g., Git) and agile development methodologies.
* Familiarity with UI/UX design principles and the ability to collaborate effectively with designers.
* Excellent problem\\-solving skills and a proactive attitude towards finding solutions.
* Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks while adhering to deadlines.
* Strong attention to detail and a passion for creating exceptional user experiences.



  





**Good to Have:** 




  




* You are an entrepreneur at heart, i.e you are not only excited about startups but also really understand what it is like to work in one.
* You are excited to learn new things and do not shy away from going above and beyond the traditional growth paths. You have strong communication skills.
* You can quickly adapt to the changing environment and are quick to pick up new skills if required to get the job done.
* You have the ability to break down a problem into smaller chunks and the ability to balance between the big picture and tactical activities.

 At Roma, we promote a culture of open communication, collaboration, and empowerment. We value transparency, meritocracy, and a strong work ethic. Join our early team and help us build something exceptional.

* Diverse and inclusive workspace.

title: Manual Test Engineer
description:
At ProArch, we partner with businesses around the world to turn big ideas into better outcomes through IT services that span cybersecurity, cloud, data, AI, and app development. We're 400\\+ team members strong across 3 countries (we call ourselves ProArchians)—and here's what connects us all:
   

  

* A love for solving real business problems
* A belief in doing what's right


**What's it like to work here?**
* You'll keep growing. You'll work alongside domain experts who love to share what they know
* You'll be supported, heard, and trusted to make an impact
* You'll take on projects that touch industries, communities, and lives
* You'll have the time to focus on what matters most in your life outside of work


 At ProArch, you'll be part of teams that design and deliver technology solutions solving real business challenges for our clients. With services spanning AI, Data, Application Development, Cybersecurity, Cloud \\& Infrastructure, and Industry Solutions, your work may involve building intelligent applications, securing business‑critical systems, or supporting cloud migrations and infrastructure modernization.
   

  

 Every role here contributes to shaping outcomes for global clients and driving meaningful impact. You'll collaborate with experts across data, AI, engineering, cloud, cybersecurity, and infrastructure—solving complex problems with creativity, precision, and purpose. You'll join a culture rooted in technology, curiosity, and continuous learning. A place where we move fast, trust you to make an impact, encourage innovation, and support your growth.
   

  

**Job Description:**
 ProArch is looking for a detail\\-oriented QA Engineer \\- Manual to join our quality assurance team. In this role, you will be responsible for executing manual testing on software applications to ensure they meet quality standards and customer expectations. You will collaborate with developers and product owners to identify, document, and resolve defects.
   

  

**Responsibilities:**
* Analyze business and technical requirements to understand application functionality
* Design, write, and execute detailed test cases, test scenarios, and test plans
* Perform functional, regression, smoke, sanity, integration, system, and UAT testing
* Identify, log, track, and retest defects using defect‑tracking tools
* Work closely with developers, product owners, and BA teams to clarify requirements and resolve issues
* Validate bug fixes and perform regression testing to ensure defect resolution
* Participate in sprint planning, daily stand‑ups, and retrospectives in Agile/Scrum environments
* Ensure adherence to QA standards and best practices
* Provide regular test status updates and detailed test reports


**Requirements**
* 5 years of proven experience in Manual Software Testing
* Strong understanding of Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC) and SDLC
* Excellent knowledge of testing types and methodologies
* Hands‑on experience with test case design techniques
* Experience with defect management tools (e.g., JIRA, Bugzilla, Azure DevOps)
* Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies
* Good understanding of databases and ability to write basic SQL queries
* Strong analytical, troubleshooting, and communication skills
* Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast‑paced environment


**Good to Have :**
* Exposure to API testing (Postman or similar tools)
* Knowledge of basic automation concepts
* Experience testing web‑based and/or enterprise applications
* Familiarity with test management tools like TestRail, Zephyr, or HP ALM


**Life @ ProArch**
* At ProArch, we believe our people are the key to our success. That's why we foster an environment where every employee—known proudly as a ProArchian—can grow, thrive, and make a meaningful impact
* We empower employees to develop at their own pace through Career Pathways, a clear and supportive guide to professional progression
* Our culture is one of positivity, inclusivity, and respect. Titles don't define how we treat each other—every ProArchian is valued equally, and collaboration across roles and teams is the norm
* We understand that great work starts with balance. That's why we prioritize work\\-life harmony, offering flexible work schedules and encouraging time for what matters most
* Beyond the workplace, ProArchians actively give back—organizing volunteer efforts and charitable initiatives that empower the communities we call home
* And because we know that extraordinary efforts deserve recognition, we celebrate those who go above and beyond with appreciation programs
* At ProArch, we're not just using technology to transform businesses—we're using it to create a better experience for our people, our clients, and our communities

 Required Technical Skills: Core Engineering

 Systems \\& Platforms

 AI / Data (Working Knowledge)

**Qualifications**

title: Senior Member of Technical Staff (Systems)
description:
Job Description
 



**About the Role:** 




 We are seeking a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer to join our team and contribute to the development and maintenance of our critical systems. The ideal candidate will have a strong foundation in systems engineering principles, with a deep understanding of filesystems, Linux, Operating system, and kernel concepts.
 



  





**What You’ll Do:**

* Bug Resolution: Actively participate in on\\-call, diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve complex software bugs across various system components, ensuring timely and efficient problem\\-solving.
* Customer Issue Management: Interact directly with customers to understand their technical issues, provide troubleshooting guidance, and resolve software bugs
* System Optimization: Identify performance bottlenecks and implement optimizations to improve system efficiency and scalability.
* Code Review: Conduct code reviews to ensure adherence to coding standards, best practices, and maintainability.
* Documentation: Create and maintain clear and concise technical documentation, including design specifications, user manuals, and troubleshooting guides.



  





**What You Bring:** 



* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related field.
* 3\\+ years of experience in software engineering or a similar role.
* Strong proficiency in Linux operating systems, scripting, and kernel internals.
* In\\-depth knowledge of filesystem and system calls
* Strong understanding of distributed systems concepts,
* Strong proficiency in C\\+\\+ programming language
* Excellent problem\\-solving, debugging, and analytical skills.
* Ability to work independently and as part of a collaborative team.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
* Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure).
* Knowledge of containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes).
* Experience with zookeeper, hadoop, Postgres, Cassandra.
* Experience with scripting languages (Python, Bash).
* Contributions to open\\-source projects.

title: Software Engineer in Test II
description:
Role Overview
   

  

 You'll be a key part of the team building the next generation of a global SaaS compliance platform, making sure new features are fast, reliable, and ready for real\\-world use. You'll own test automation end\\-to\\-end for web applications, working closely with developers and product teams to ship high\\-quality releases with confidence.
   

  

 Alongside modern test automation, you'll also help shape how AI shows up in the product and in testing. You'll work with tools like Playwright and Cypress, test REST APIs and backend services, and use AI to speed up test design, debugging, and documentation—while keeping quality, security, and ethics front and center.
   

  

 Here's a breakdown of what you'll do (not all of it, just the important stuff)
   

  

* Design, build, and maintain automated tests for web applications using Playwright, Cypress, and related tooling.
* Create and manage test scenarios, test cases, and test data for new and existing product features across the UI, API, and backend.
* Integrate automated tests into CI/CD pipelines, helping to improve reliability, coverage, and speed of releases.
* Use AI tools to accelerate test case generation, analysis, and debugging, validating outputs for accuracy, safety, and cost.
* Partner with engineers and product managers to define test strategies, estimate test effort, and report meaningful quality metrics.
* Contribute to code and test reviews, helping to maintain a stable, well\\-tested codebase and driving continuous improvement in QA practices.


 These are the essentials you'll need to get an interview
   

  

* 3–5 years of experience in automated testing for web applications.
* Strong hands\\-on experience with modern test automation frameworks such as Playwright and/or Cypress.
* Solid understanding of QA fundamentals, testing best practices, and testing types (functional, regression, exploratory, cross‑browser).
* Experience testing APIs and backend services, including designing and executing test cases for REST or similar interfaces.
* Practical experience with test management and issue\\-tracking tools (for example JIRA, Zephyr or similar).
* Demonstrated use of AI tools to enhance productivity in testing or development, and awareness of concepts like tokens, context length, and hallucinations.
* Clear, collaborative communication skills and the ability to own tasks end\\-to\\-end while working effectively with cross‑functional teams.


 It would be great if you had these too, but we'll support you if you don't
   

  

* Experience integrating automated tests deeply into CI/CD workflows and optimizing them for speed, stability, and maintainability.
* Exposure to AI\\-enabled product features, including testing AI integrations and understanding privacy, security, and ethical considerations.
* A degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience in software engineering and test automation.

 Diligent is the AI leader in governance, risk and compliance (GRC) SaaS solutions, helping more than 1 million users and 700,000 board members to clarify risk and elevate governance. The Diligent One Platform gives practitioners, the C\\-Suite and the board a consolidated view of their entire GRC practice so they can more effectively manage risk, build greater resilience and make better decisions, faster.

Curiosity is in our DNA, we look for individuals willing to ask the big questions and experiment fearlessly \\- those who embrace change not as a challenge, but as an opportunity. The future belongs to those who keep learning, and we are building it together. At Diligent, you're not just building the future \\- you're an agent of positive change, joining a global community on a mission to make an impact.
   

  

 Learn more at diligent.com or follow us on LinkedIn and Facebook
   

  

  

  

**What Diligent Offers You**
* **Creativity is ingrained in our culture.** 
 We are innovative collaborators by nature. We thrive in exploring how things can be differently both in our internal processes and to help our clients
* **We care about our people.** 
 Diligent offers a flexible work environment, global days of service, comprehensive health benefits, meeting free days, generous time off policy and wellness programs to name a few

 . We may be headquartered in New York City, but we have office hubs in Washington D.C., Vancouver, London, Galway, Budapest, Munich, Bengaluru, Singapore, and Sydney.

 Growing, maintaining and promoting a diverse team is a top priority for us. We foster and encourage diversity through our Employee Resource Groups and provide access to resources and education to support the education of our team, facilitate dialogue, and foster understanding.


 Diligent created the modern governance movement. Our world\\-changing idea is to empower leaders with the technology, insights and connections they need to drive greater impact and accountability – to lead with purpose. Our employees are passionate, smart, and creative people who not only want to help build the software company of the future, but who want to make the world a more sustainable, equitable and better place.
   

  

 Headquartered in New York, Diligent has offices in Washington D.C., London, Galway, Budapest, Vancouver, Bengaluru, Munich, Singapore and Sydney.  To foster strong collaboration and connection, this role will follow a hybrid work model. If you are within a commuting distance to one of our Diligent office locations, you will be expected to
 **work onsite at least 50% of the time.** 
 We believe that in\\-person engagement helps drive innovation, teamwork, and a strong sense of community.
   

  

 We are a drug free workplace. Diligent is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religious creed, sex, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, pregnancy, childbirth, physical disability, mental disability, age, military status, protected veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner or civil union status, gender (including sex stereotyping and gender identity or expression), medical condition (including, but not limited to, cancer related or HIV/AIDS related), genetic information, or sexual orientation in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws. We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. title: Integration Specialist
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 




  





 Excelfore delivers end\\-to\\-end data connectivity platforms for digital life cycle management of edge devices in complex, heterogeneous environments. Our solutions power next\\-generation connected and autonomous vehicles for leading global OEMs.
 



 Our key technologies include:
 



 ● eSync OTA platform (based on the eSync Alliance standard)
 



 ● eDatX for data aggregation
 



 ● eLearn analytics
 



 ● In\\-vehicle networking stacks
 



 Headquartered in Silicon Valley, Excelfore has global offices in Shanghai, Frankfurt, Tokyo, and Bengaluru. Our software is deployed in millions of vehicles worldwide
 



  





**JOB SUMMARY** 




 We are seeking an experienced OTA Integration Expert to support the development and integration of Over\\-the\\-Air (OTA) software update solutions using eSync in a connected vehicle / Software Defined Vehicle (SDV) environment. The role involves working closely with OEM engineering teams, Tier\\-1 suppliers, cloud backend teams, and vehicle ECU developers to ensure seamless end\\-to\\-end OTA functionality from cloud to vehicle ECUs. The candidate will be responsible for integrating OTA client components, validating vehicle\\-cloud communication, supporting ECU onboarding for OTA updates, and troubleshooting integration issues across the vehicle platform. The role requires strong expertise in automotive ECU architecture, OTA workflows, embedded systems, and multi\\-vendor system integration.
 



**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES :** 




  





 ● Integrate eSync OTA client/agent across vehicle ECUs such as TCU, Head Unit (IVI),
 



 Gateway, and other domain controllers.
 



 ● Support OEM teams in aligning OTA architecture with the vehicle electrical/electronic
 



 architecture.
 



 ● Define OTA integration approaches for different ECU types (application update, firmware
 



 update, containerized updates, etc.).
 



 ECU Onboarding for OTA
 



 ● Support Tier\\-1 suppliers in integrating OTA client components into ECUs.
 



 ● Validate OTA package installation workflows and manifest handling.
 



 ● Enable software inventory reporting and ECU update capability.
 



  





**Vehicle–Cloud OTA Interface Validation** 




 ● Validate communication between vehicle OTA client and backend OTA platform.
 



 ● Verify flows such as: Device registration , Secure authentication ,Package download
 



 ● Installation status reporting
 



 ● Work with backend teams to validate API interactions and OTA campaign execution.
 



  





**End\\-to\\-End OTA Testing** 




 ● Execute system\\-level OTA validation across vehicle prototypes and test benches.
 



 ● Validate scenarios such as: a) Full vehicle update, b) Partial ECU updates c) Update interruption recovery
 



 d) Rollback and error handling
 



 ● Support HIL / bench / vehicle validation environments.
 



  





**Issue Investigation and Debugging** 




 ● Analyze and troubleshoot OTA failures across:
 



 ● OTA client/agent
 



 ● ECU flashing processes
 



 ● network connectivity
 



 ● backend APIs
 



 ● package signing and validation
 



 ● Perform log analysis and root cause investigation.
 



  





**Multi\\-Vendor Integration Coordination** 




 ● Collaborate with OEM platform teams, Tier\\-1 suppliers, OTA backend teams, cybersecurity
 



 teams, and validation teams.
 



 ● Identify and resolve integration dependencies and blockers.
 



 ● Track OTA readiness across ECUs and suppliers.
 



  





**Documentation and Integration Guidance** 




 ● Prepare and maintain:
 



 ● OTA integration guidelines
 



 ● ECU onboarding documentation
 



 ● troubleshooting playbooks
 



 ● architecture documentation
 



 ● Support knowledge sharing across development and validation teams
 



  





**Must have** 




 ● 7–8 years of experience in automotive software integration or embedded systems.
 



 ● Strong experience in OTA update systems, preferably using eSync or similar OTA
 



 frameworks.
 



 ● Good understanding of automotive ECU architecture and vehicle network systems.
 



 ● Experience with automotive communication protocols such as CAN and Automotive
 



 Ethernet.
 



 ● Familiarity with UDS diagnostics and ECU flashing mechanisms.
 



 ● Strong experience in embedded Linux environments.
 



 Experience analyzing system logs and performing root cause analysis.
 



 ● Good understanding of REST APIs and client\\-server communication.
 



 ● Experience working in multi\\-supplier automotive integration environments.
 



 ● Strong debugging and system integration skills
 



  





**Desirable Skills** 




 ● Experience working with connected vehicle platforms or SDV architectures.
 



 ● Familiarity with OTA backend platforms and campaign management systems.
 



 ● Understanding of automotive cybersecurity concepts such as certificates, TLS, and secure
 



 software updates.
 



 ● Experience with DevOps pipelines, CI/CD, and OTA deployment processes.
 



 ● Exposure to vehicle test benches, HIL systems, or integration labs.
 



 ● Knowledge of scripting languages such as Python or Bash for debugging and automation.
 



 ● Experience working directly with OEM engineering teams and Tier\\-1 suppliers.
 



  





  





 We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. Accordingly, we do not discriminate based on race, religion, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.

description:

Amazon Search team creates customer\\-focused search solutions and technologies that makes shopping delightful and effortless for our customers. title: Senior Software Development Engineer I - Linux Platform
description:
**About Esper**
 Esper revolutionizes device management by redefining what it should be: a driver of business growth. With advanced and modern capabilities, automation replaces outdated workflows, re\\-provisioning becomes obsolete, and managing by exception transforms efficiency, resulting in increased efficiency, improved ROI, and bolsters security for device fleets of all sizes. Esper has been recognized as number 735 on Inc. Magazine's 2025 5000 fastest\\-growing private companies in America, and 133 on the 2024 Deloitte Technology Fast 500\\. Some of the world’s most innovative brands, like Google, Doordash, Taco Bell, Clinical ink, SF 49ers, and Intelity, rely on Esper to deliver exceptional device experiences. Esper partners with the leading mobile device hardware manufacturers, solution providers, and distributors globally.
   

  

 Esper is experiencing hyper growth! We're the industry's first DevOps SaaS platform designed to provide a simple, safe, and secure way for engineering and DevOps teams to release applications and manage smart Android devices. Now, we're expanding our platform to support Linux devices, bringing the same powerful management capabilities to the Linux ecosystem.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 We're seeking a Senior Software Development Engineer I to join our Linux platform team and help pioneer device management solutions for Linux platforms. You'll be instrumental in building the core infrastructure that enables organizations to manage, monitor, and control large fleets of Linux devices at scale. This role offers a unique opportunity to work at the intersection of systems programming, distributed systems, and modern cloud architectures.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 Build Linux Platform: Develop core components of our Linux device management system, including agent software, communication protocols, and remote control capabilities. You'll work with technologies like VNC, WebRTC, and custom protocols for device interaction.
   

  

 System\\-Level Development: Write system\\-level code that interfaces with Linux kernel, manages device resources, and ensures secure, efficient operation across diverse Linux distributions and hardware platforms.
   

  

 Embedded Linux Integration: Work with Yocto/OpenEmbedded to build custom Linux distributions, create BitBake recipes, and optimize images for various device types and architectures.
   

  

 Backend Services: Design and implement scalable backend services and APIs that handle millions of device interactions, telemetry data, and real\\-time commands.
   

  

 Full\\-Stack Contribution: While primarily focused on backend and systems, contribute to frontend development (React/TypeScript) to build intuitive dashboards and management interfaces when needed.
   

  

 Architecture \\& Design: Participate in architectural decisions, design distributed systems, and contribute to technical roadmap planning for the Linux platform.
   

  

 Code Quality: Conduct code reviews, establish best practices for systems programming, and maintain high standards for performance, security, and reliability.
   

  

**Experience Level**
* 4\\+ years of software development experience
* Good to have experience in Linux/Unix systems programming
* Experience building production systems at scale


**Required**
* Backend Development: RESTful APIs, microservices architecture
* Understanding of Linux OS, system programming, kernel concepts
* Programming Languages: Go, C/C\\+\\+
* Experience with backend development: APIs, microservices, distributed systems
* Proficiency with SQL databases (PostgreSQL preferred)
* Strong debugging and performance optimization skills
* Experience with version control (Git) and collaborative development
* Ability to work across the full stack (including frontend when needed)
* Demonstrate proficiency with AI\\-assisted development tools and best practices


**Preferred**
* Experience with embedded Linux and Yocto/OpenEmbedded
* Knowledge of Linux kernel, kernel modules, or device drivers
* Experience with build systems (CMake, Makefile, cross\\-compilation)
* Familiarity with message brokers (MQTT, Kafka) and networking protocols
* Cloud platforms experience (AWS, GCP, Azure)
* Container technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)


**Bonus**
* Experience with VNC, remote desktop protocols (RFB, RDP, WebRTC)
* MDM or device management systems knowledge
* Security practices in embedded/systems programming
* Open\\-source contributions to Linux or embedded projects

title: Data Engineer I, CMT Dataplatform & Analytics
description:
**Description**
 Amazon strives to be Earth's most customer\\-centric company where people can find and discover virtually anything they want to buy online. By giving customers more of what they want \\- low prices, vast selection, and convenience \\- Amazon continues to grow and evolve as a world\\-class e\\-commerce platform.The competitive pricing team is responsible for ensuring that we earn and keep our customer trust around our low prices. This involves ensuring for all the products that are sold on Amazon marketplaces worldwide, customers get the best price. Data engineering team \\- a part of pricing Big Data team \\- is responsible for building and maintaining the data platform that helps Amazon businesses worldwide in maintaining price competitiveness. By collating and transforming large amount of data from various sources, exposing pricing gaps via dashboards and reports and providing ability to deep dive and extract insights, data engineering team helps in improving operational efficiency and meeting business goals around pricing.
   

  

 You will be part of team that will work with the tech, analytics, product, machine learning and technology teams to provide real time data processing solution that give Amazon leadership, PMs timely, flexible and structured access to customer insights. The team will be responsible for building this platform end to end using latest AWS technologies and software development principles.
   

  

 As a Data Engineer , you will be responsible for leading the architecture, design and development of the data, metrics and reporting platform for Pricing. You will architect and implement new and automated Business Intelligence solutions, including big data and new analytical capabilities that support our Development Engineers, Analysts and Retail business stakeholders with timely, actionable data, metrics and reports while satisfying scalability, reliability, accuracy, performance and budget goals and driving automation and operational efficiencies. You will partner with business leaders to drive strategy and prioritize projects and feature sets. You will also write and review business cases and drive the development process from design to release. In addition, you will provide technical leadership and mentoring for a team of highly capable Data Engineers.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Own design and execution of end to end projects
* Own managing Amazon Pricing services data infrastructure
* Build end to end Data Pipeline for Amazon Pricing
* Establish key relationships which span Amazon business units and Business Intelligence teams
* Implement standardized, automated operational and quality control processes to deliver accurate and timely data and reporting to meet or exceed SLAs


**Basic Qualifications**
* 2\\+ years of data engineering experience
* Experience with data modeling, warehousing and building ETL pipelines
* Experience with one or more query language (e.g., SQL, PL/SQL, DDL, MDX, HiveQL, SparkSQL, Scala)
* Experience with one or more scripting language (e.g., Python, KornShell)
* Bachelor's degree or above in computer science, computer engineering, or related field


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with big data technologies such as: Hadoop, Hive, Spark, EMR
* Experience with any ETL tool like, Informatica, ODI, SSIS, BODI, Datastage, etc.

title: Applied Scientist I, Search Relevance International
description:
**Description**
 At Amazon Search, we discover experience that connects millions of customers to the products they seek across our global marketplace. Our team develops sophisticated search solutions that make Amazon's vast product catalog easily accessible to customers worldwide. We're building next\\-generation search infrastructure that enables seamless expansion into new markets and product categories. Our mission is to ensure every customer enjoys an exceptional search experience from day one, whether they're shopping in an established market or a newly launched region.
   

  

 We develop intelligent, scalable systems that optimize search quality and effectiveness across Amazon's diverse product ecosystem. Our innovations help customers find exactly what they're looking for, while enabling Amazon to rapidly expand its global presence with consistent, high\\-quality search capabilities. We are seeking a strong applied scientists to join the Search Relevance India team. This team’s charter is to increase the pace at which Amazon expands and improve the search experience at launch. In practice, we aim to invent universally applicable signals and algorithms for training machine\\-learned ranking models and improve the machine\\-learning framework for training and offline evaluation that is used for all new relevance models.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Build machine learning models for Product Search.
* Develop new ranking features and techniques building upon the latest results from the academic research community.
* Propose and validate hypothesis to direct our business and product road map. Work with engineers to make low latency model predictions and scale the throughput of the system.
* Focus on identifying and solving customer problems with simple and elegant solutions.
* Design, develop, and implement production level code that serves billions of search requests. Own the full development cycle: design, development, impact assessment, A/B testing (including interpretation of results) and production deployment.
* Take ownership. Understand the needs of various search teams, distill those into coherent projects, and implement them with an eye on long\\-term impact.
* Be a leader. Use your expertise to set a high bar for the team, mentor team members, set the tone for how to take on and deliver on large impossible\\-sounding projects.
* Be curious. You will work alongside systems engineers, machine learning scientists, and data analysts. Your effectiveness and impact will depend on discussing problems with and learning from them. You will have access to the advanced edge technologies and vast technical tools and resources of Amazon and will need to learn how to use them effectively.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Experience programming in Java, C\\+\\+, Python or related language
* Experience with SQL and an RDBMS (e.g., Oracle) or Data Warehouse


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience implementing algorithms using both toolkits and self\\-developed code
* Have publications at top\\-tier peer\\-reviewed conferences or journals

title: Senior Embedded Software Engineer
description:
**Company Description** 




 Satomov Tech LLP is a global leader in developing intelligent AI software, advanced automation systems, and robotics solutions for businesses across diverse industries. By leveraging expertise in conversational AI, workflow automation, and custom AI\\-powered platforms, Satomov delivers impactful and scalable technology to drive efficiency and innovation. The company specializes in simplifying complex processes, enhancing customer experiences, and creating long\\-term value for clients worldwide. Through its commitment to innovation and practical implementation, Satomov transforms ideas into future\\-ready digital systems that enable growth and success.
 



  





 Position: Senior Embedded Software Engineer
 



 Location: Hyderabad (Onsite)
 



  





 About the Role
 



 We are seeking an experienced Senior Embedded Software Engineer to lead the design and development of a modular embedded product line. This role requires strong system\\-level design, hands\\-on firmware development, and experience with robotics, machine vision, and cloud\\-connected systems.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 


* Lead the design of electronic architecture and select components such as MCUs, sensors, actuators, and connectivity modules
* Develop modular embedded software with support for communication, diagnostics, and OTA updates
* Design and integrate machine vision pipelines, including image preprocessing and edge inference
* Develop and maintain ROS\\-based components for robotic coordination
* Implement real\\-time motor and actuator control using PWM, encoders, and PID systems
* Design and implement communication protocols such as CAN, UART, SPI, I2C, and Ethernet
* Integrate embedded systems with AWS cloud services for telemetry and application workflows
* Create detailed documentation, including flowcharts, interface specifications, and test procedures
* Collaborate with cross\\-functional teams and mentor junior engineers



  





 Required Qualifications
 


* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field
* Minimum 6 years of experience in embedded systems development with exposure to senior or lead responsibilities
* Strong proficiency in C and C\\+\\+ for embedded applications
* Experience with RTOS such as FreeRTOS or Zephyr and Linux\\-based embedded platforms
* Hands\\-on experience with hardware architecture design and component selection
* Experience with machine vision frameworks such as OpenCV or TensorFlow Lite
* Working knowledge of ROS (ROS1 or ROS2\\)
* Experience in motor control and robotic systems integration
* Familiarity with AWS cloud services and IoT integration
* Understanding of communication protocols and wireless technologies
* Strong debugging, testing, and documentation skills



  





 Preferred Skills
 


* Experience with MoveIt for robotic applications
* Familiarity with Yocto or Buildroot environments
* Knowledge of embedded security practices such as secure boot and firmware signing
* Experience with hardware bring\\-up and lab testing

title: Senior Reverse Engineer
description:
**It is a Freelance or part time role (or if you are looking for full time we need Immediate joiner)** 




  





 We are hiring a senior\\-level engineer who can analyze complex web application behavior, inspect network and protocol flows, and design resilient data\\-observability and test frameworks for authorized environments.
 



 This role focuses on:
 


* web protocol analysis
* browser and network traffic inspection
* data extraction architecture
* anti\\-bot resilience testing in permitted environments
* reverse engineering of web delivery flows
* designing research plans and technical validation roadmaps for authorized systems, staging systems, and internal testbeds



 The ideal candidate is highly hands\\-on, technically deep, and able to convert unclear system behavior into structured technical findings, repeatable tooling, and practical engineering plans.
 



**Core Responsibilities** 



* Analyze web applications and browser behavior to understand request/response lifecycles, session flows, token usage, and state transitions.
* Investigate HTTP/HTTPS, WebSocket, SSE, polling, and related transport patterns in authorized environments.
* Design and implement traffic inspection, logging, observability, and replay tooling for internal systems and approved test targets.
* Reverse engineer obfuscated or poorly documented web flows to identify data paths, event triggers, payload structures, and protocol sequencing.
* Build internal research utilities for browser instrumentation, capture analysis, payload decoding, and protocol inspection.
* Design robust data extraction and normalization pipelines from dynamic web sources where permitted.
* Evaluate failure points in anti\\-bot protections, session handling, retries, proxy routing, and traffic stability for defensive engineering and QA purposes.
* Produce technical research documents, attack\\-surface maps, protocol maps, and implementation plans for engineering leadership.
* Work closely with backend, data, QA, and platform teams to turn research findings into production\\-safe monitoring or ingestion systems.
* Create repeatable test plans and internal education materials for complex web traffic and protocol behavior.



**Required Experience** 



* 5\\+ years of experience in reverse engineering, web protocol analysis, security research, browser automation, or network\\-centric web systems engineering.
* Strong experience analyzing:
* HTTP/HTTPS
* WebSocket
* browser network behavior
* cookies, headers, tokens, and session flows
* Strong hands\\-on experience with browser debugging and instrumentation.
* Experience building Python\\- or Node.js\\-based research tools and automation scripts.
* Experience with traffic inspection and debugging tools such as:
* Chrome DevTools
* mitmproxy
* Burp Suite
* Charles Proxy
* Fiddler
* HAR/network log analysis workflows
* Experience understanding dynamic web apps beyond simple DOM scraping.
* Ability to investigate minified or obfuscated frontend behavior and trace how UI actions map to network events.
* Experience documenting technical findings clearly for engineering teams.
* Strong systems thinking: able to move from raw observations to a practical implementation or validation plan.



**Strongly Preferred** 



* Experience with Playwright, Puppeteer, Selenium, or other browser automation frameworks.
* Experience with aiohttp, async pipelines, proxy routing, retry logic, and fault\\-tolerant data collection systems.
* Experience in packet, payload, or message inspection for real\\-time or near\\-real\\-time systems.
* Experience decoding undocumented payload structures, transport wrappers, or application\\-layer encodings.
* Experience designing internal staging/testbed environments that simulate real traffic and edge cases.
* Experience mentoring engineers and leading technical investigations from hypothesis to conclusion.



**What We Want This Person To Be Able To Do** 



* Take a complex web platform with unclear behavior and explain how it works at the browser, request, and protocol layers.
* Build a research plan for how to observe, validate, and model the system safely inside authorized environments.
* Identify where state is created, where it mutates, how events are transported, and what dependencies exist between frontend and backend flows.
* Separate signal from noise in complex traffic.
* Design proof\\-of\\-concept tooling for observability, replay, validation, and protocol mapping.
* Turn ad hoc investigation into a structured engineering roadmap.



**What This Role Is Not** 



* Not a basic scraper role.
* Not limited to Playwright clicking or HTML parsing.
* Not a generic SOC analyst role.
* Not a pure malware or exploit\\-development role.
* Not a purely academic research role without implementation ability.



**Ideal Candidate Profile** 




 The best candidate will likely come from one or more of these backgrounds:
 


* senior web reverse engineering
* protocol analysis
* traffic analysis and browser instrumentation
* security research for complex web apps
* data extraction engineering for dynamic systems
* adversarial QA / anti\\-bot resilience testing in authorized environments



 They should be able to operate independently, investigate ambiguous systems, and propose a technically realistic plan without excessive hand\\-holding.

title: Principal Statistical Programmer
job_function: Research, Information Technology, and Health Care Provider
description:
**Sponsor\\-dedicated:** 




 Working fully embedded within one of our pharmaceutical clients, with the support of Cytel right behind you, you'll be at the heart of our client's innovation. As a Principal Statistical Programmer, you will be dedicated to one of our global pharmaceutical clients; a company that is driving the next generation of patient treatment, where individuals are empowered to work with autonomy and ownership. This is an exciting time to be a part of this new program.
 



  





**Position Overview:** 




 This position reports to the Director, Biostatistics and Programming in the FSP Services business unit in Cytel. The Principal Statistical Programmer works independently with only concept level instruction and very little supervision; tracks progress and provides expert technical support to team members. We are looking for a highly experienced senior statistical programmer who will work on clinical development programs on different therapeutic areas and participate in overseeing CRO programmers to ensure that data summaries are delivered in a consistent, high\\-quality manner. This individual will be responsible for implementing all reporting and analysis activities for the Sponsor clinical trials.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




**As a Principal Statistical Programmer, your responsibilities will include:** 



* Generate SDTM, ADaM specifications, datasets, reviewer’s guide and define.xml files for multiple studies
* Develop SAS programs which generate datasets, complex listings, tables (including those with descriptive and standard inferential statistics in collaboration with a Statistician), and complex graphs
* Deliver high\\-quality statistical programming results including developing, validating, and maintaining SAS and/or R programs tailored to clinical development programs’ needs
* Participate in overseeing CRO’s statistical programming deliverables for multiple clinical studies to ensure high\\-quality and meet the pre\\-specified timelines
* Support the preparation of clinical study reports, regulatory submissions, publications, annual DSUR, and exploratory analyses
* Understand and follow FDA regulations which affect the reporting of clinical trial data. This includes good clinical practice and guidelines for electronic submissions.
* Contribute to the creation, maintenance, documentation, and validation of standards for programming tools, outputs, and macros
* Participate in the development of CRFs, edit check specifications, and data validation plans
* Provide review and/or author data transfer specifications for external vendor data
* Collaborate with internal and external functions (e.g. CROs, software vendors, clinical development partners, etc.) to ensure meeting project timelines and goals
* Provide review and/or author SOPs and/or Work Instructions related to statistical programming practices.



  





**Qualifications** 




**Here at Cytel we want our employees to succeed, and we enable this success through consistent training, development and support. To be successful in this position you will have:** 



* At a minimum bachelor’s degree in computer science, data science, mathematics, or statistics major preferred
* 7\\+ years of experience as a Statistical Programmer on a Biotech/Pharma Clinical Development Biometrics Team or with a similar team and experience supporting drug development, medical device development, or intervention studies
* Exceptional SAS programming skills and expertise in the development and implementation of statistical programming procedures and processes in a clinical development environment
* Extensive applied experience of CDISC standards (SDTM, ADaM, and Define.xml), medical terminology, clinical trial methodologies, and FDA/ICH regulation
* Experience supporting regulatory submissions, interacting with the FDA and/or global regulatory authorities
* Must be able to work independently
* Outstanding communication skills (written and verbal) and strong leadership skills



**Preferred Qualifications (nice to have)** 



* Prior work experience with pharmacokinetic data and the neuroscience field,
* proficiency in languages or tools other than SAS (e.g., R, Python, and Java, Shiny, Markdown, Unix/Linux and git)

description:
**Job Title:** 
 Senior Software Engineer
   

  

**Location:** 
 Hybrid / Remote
   

  

**Job Type:** 
 Full\\-time
   

  

****About ServiceChannel****
 ServiceChannel is the leading cloud\\-based service automation platform for facilities management. We empower businesses to source, procure, manage, and pay for repair and maintenance services through a single, unified platform. Our mission is to simplify operations and deliver exceptional customer experiences through innovation and technology.
   

  

****Position Overview****
 ServiceChannel software engineers are the initiators and enablers, making ideas a reality. They are responsible for the design and implementation of our solutions using proven software architecture, engineering techniques and sound design principles. Prospective candidates must have extensive experience in developing software as a service (SaaS) using .Net and cloud. They must understand information systems and secure development lifecycles.
   

  

 Deep knowledge of web application flows, components, databases, and security principles are required. The candidate will work on enterprise software, data and other projects executing ServiceChannel’s winning product strategy and roadmap.
   

  

 Collaborating with global teams, you will contribute a local perspective and leverage opportunities to work on international projects, enhancing your skills and expertise. Join us to be part of a diverse and inclusive work environment, where innovation and collaboration drive success.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities****
 Develop high\\-quality, performant, scalable, efficient, testable, reusable, and maintainable code.
   

  

 Enhance and maintain existing software and architecture, optimizing the platform and its functionality for maximum performance and scalability.
   

  

 Collaborate effectively with a multidisciplinary team, including Software Engineers, Product Owners, Project Managers, DevOps, and QA professionals.
   

  

 Evaluate and research new technologies to stay ahead in the industry and incorporate innovative solutions.
   

  

 Assess and review technical architectures to ensure robustness and scalability.
   

  

 Support team members with their tasks and commitments, fostering a collaborative and productive work environment.
   

  

 Adhere to the company's software development lifecycle (SDLC) and established development processes.
   

  

****Required Skills \\& Experience****
 Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, a related field, or equivalent work experience.
   

  

 Over 5 years of experience as a backend developer, with proficiency in Microsoft .Net C\\#, MS SQL Server, ASP.Net MVC, .Net Core, and Redis.
   

  

 Proven experience in API development, including REST and OData.
   

  

 Solid understanding of the SDLC process and associated tools such as JIRA, GitHub, and CI/CD pipeline technologies.
   

  

 Strong knowledge of modern best practices in coding, software design, and architecture.
   

  

 Hands\\-on experience with cloud technologies and deployment in Azure and/or AWS environments.
   

  

 Experience with the Elastic Stack, including Elasticsearch, Kibana, and Logstash.
   

  

 Proficient in Unit Testing and a solid understanding of Test Automation principles.

title: Salesforce Platform Solution Manager
description:

 Global

**Role** 
**Overview**
 We are seeking a strategic and hands\\-on
 **Senior Sales Force Architect \\& Platform Administrator** 
 to lead the design, implementation, and evolution of Salesforce platforms across TMICC. This role is accountable for end\\-to\\-end Salesforce solution architecture, platform governance, and technical excellence, ensuring scalable, secure, and high\\-performing CRM solutions aligned with TMICC’s global business strategy.
   

  

 The role blends architectural leadership, hands\\-on technical delivery, and stakeholder collaboration to enable innovation, standardization, and long\\-term platform sustainability.
   

  

**Scope of the Role**
* Develop comprehensive Sales Force architecture blueprints and solution design artifacts for technology engagements in collaboration with TMICC SI partners and product owners.
* Provide innovative solutions to complex challenges, architect high\\-impact projects, and ensure robust design and review processes while maintaining hands\\-on technical expertise.
* Recommend Salesforce.com\\-based solutions, integration strategies, and implementation architectures to enhance business efficiency, scalability, and performance.
* Define and enforce technical best practices for Salesforce implementation, ensuring alignment with the client’s enterprise architecture and future scalability.
* Conduct code reviews to guarantee adherence to best practices and maintain high\\-quality standards across teams and projects.
* Identify potential application performance bottlenecks early in the implementation phase and propose effective remediation strategies.
* Contribute to the creation of reusable assets for future projects and support gap analysis and Salesforce roadmap development.
* Mentor developers through code reviews, solution design guidance, and tailored training and development plans.
* Collaborate with internal and external process owners/SMEs to analyze Salesforce opportunities and recommend CRM, TPM, eB2B, and SFA solutions.
* Perform detailed analysis, documentation, and understanding of business processes where required.
* Execute Proof of Concept (PoC) initiatives using the latest Salesforce offerings to validate technology feasibility.
* Drive standardization, technology alignment, and reporting processes for enterprise\\-level CRM implementations.
* Provide support to TMICC operational teams during UAT and rollout phases to ensure successful deployment.


**Key Responsibilities**
**Solution Architecture**
* Oversee SAP security operations including user/role/FFID/OSS management and automation.
* Lead governance meetings and ensure systems meet UL technical standards.
* Manage vendor partners to ensure SLA/KPI compliance and drive simplification.
* Define and monitor operational KPIs and exit criteria for security processes.


**Data Architecture**

**Integration Strategy**
* Designing APIs and middleware for seamless integration.
* Using tools like BTP/MQTT, REST/SOAP APIs, and event\\-driven architecture.

**Security \\& Compliance**

* Ensuring compliance with GDPR, HIPAA, and other regulations.
* Managing encryption and secure data storage.


**Performance \\& Scalability**
* Optimizing Salesforce org performance.
* Designing for high\\-volume transactions and large datasets.
* Planning for future scalability and multi\\-org strategies.


**Governance \\& Best Practices**
* Establishing development TMICC standards and CI/CD pipelines.
* Managing technical debt and release management.
* Providing architectural guidance to developers and admins.


**Innovation \\& Roadmap**
* Staying updated with Salesforce releases and new features.
* Advising on AI/Einstein, automation, and advanced analytics.
* Aligning Salesforce roadmap with business strategy.


**Project Leadership**
* Mentor developers and administrators through reviews and coaching.
* Collaborate with SMEs and stakeholders to analyze business processes.
* Lead Proof of Concept (PoC) initiatives using latest Salesforce offerings.


**Essential**
**Qualifications \\& Skills**
* Minimum of 10 years of professional experience in Salesforce Design and Implementation; 5\\+ years in architecture roles and should have managed 2 end to end Sales Force lifecycle projects \\& Platforms maintenance.
* Should have in\\-depth experience in Salesforce (SFDC) CRM and its end\\-to\\-end implementation process.
* Experience in designing and developing software components and a strong service\\-oriented architecture and integration background.
* Experience in deploying applications on App Exchange
* Should have experience integrating third\\-party applications with Salesforce using Rest or SOAP API's.
* Strong knowledge of consuming APIs (SOAP, REST). Salesforce.com integration experience, including between different business systems and working with integration tools.
* Proficiency in programming using Salesforce SFDC, Force.com, JavaScript, and XML and their use in developing CRM, TPM, SFA, eb2b solutions.
* Strong experience with configuration, customization, programming with APEX APIs, APEX Triggers, and implementing new instances of Salesforce.com from scratch.
* Strong practical deployment knowledge of Salesforce Lightning UI, Visual Force, Flex, configurations, Apex classes, APEX Web services, API, AppExchange deployment, and Salesforce.com s\\-controls.
* Ability to define the system landscape, identify gaps between current and desired end states, and deliver a CRM solution.
* Must have excellent written, verbal, and listening communication skills and prioritize and deliver the most important things first.
* Experience with SFDX, Git source control, and CICD is a plus.
* Salesforce Architect \\- CERTIFICATIONS \\| MUST HAVE
* Expert in working with cloud\\-based platforms like Azure, Databricks.
* Excellent communication, active listening and presentation skills and ability to communicate effectively with all levels in the organization.
* Passion for delivering service excellence; and developing a culture of “easy to do business with”, where customer’s needs are anticipated.
* Highly inquisitive mind\\-set with strong ability to identify, troubleshoot, problem solve and resolve issues. Passion for simplification and continuous improvement
* Strong interpersonal skills with the ability to collaborate with team members to understand and develop technology solutions for business needs.
* Organised, strong time management skills and ability to prioritize multiple tasks to meet established deadlines.
* Team\\-player who is a proactive self\\-starter, with the ability to work without oversight.
* Strong ethical standards regarding the handling of information.
* Ability to work quickly and accurately, and within a cross\\-culture and global environment.
* Ability to work with a broad, virtual team.
* Proficiency in MS Office Suite and SQL desirable.
* Analytically minded with good numerical ability and logical reasoning.


**Preferred Skills**
* Experience with Azure, Databricks, and cloud\\-based platforms.
* Knowledge of SQL and strong analytical skills.
* Experience in consumer products or FMCG environments.


**Leadership Skills**
* PASSION FOR HIGH PERFORMANCE: Ownership, accountability, and results\\-driven execution.
* PERSONAL MASTERY: High standards, resilience, and continuous self\\-improvement.
* TALENT CATALYST: Coaches and develops teams; fosters inclusive
* CONSUMER LOVE: Embeds consumer\\-centric thinking into solutions.
* BUSINESS ACUMEN: Aligns technology solutions to drive profitable growth.


**What We Offer**
* Opportunity to shape enterprise\\-scale Salesforce platforms in a global organization.
* Collaborative, innovation\\-driven environment.
* Competitive compensation and benefits.
* Strong focus on learning, growth, and career progression.

 With 19\\.000 expert ice cream colleagues and iconic brands like Wall’s, Cornetto and Ben \\& Jerry’s, loved in 76 countries, we are the world’s largest Ice Cream company leading the industry We have been taking pleasure seriously for more than 100 years, serving happiness with every lick or scoop of ice cream for generations.

title: Lead Value Engineer - CPGR
description:
We're Celonis, the global leader in Process Intelligence technology and one of the world's fastest\\-growing SaaS firms. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock productivity by placing AI, data and intelligence at the core of business processes \\- and for that, we need your help. Care to join us?
   

  

**The Role:**
 We are looking for a Lead Value Engineer, Consumer Packaged Goods (CPG)—an industry expert who can bridge the gap between technical process mining and strategic business outcomes. You will act as an architect for critical work\\-streams within a major CPG account, translating complex operational data into clear value drivers.
   

  

 As a Lead Value Engineer, you are a go\\-to execution expert within our CPG go\\-to\\-market organization. You will move beyond standard process optimization to link Celonis capabilities to key outcomes specific to fast\\-moving consumer goods operations.
   

  

 You will work in partnership with the Celonis Sales Teams and have full responsibility for the end\\-to\\-end value journey of our customers. You are our customers' trusted advisor, helping them achieve their strategic goals and realize significant value using the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform.
   

  

 In collaboration with our partners and Celonis Services, you will drive measurable business impact across various processes and accelerate the adoption of our platform. You will blend deep process and industry expertise with a proven consulting skill set and strong analytical skills at the forefront of one of the fastest\\-growing tech companies worldwide.
   

  

**The work you’ll do:**
**Identify \\& Frame Value**
* Translate Strategy to Operations: Analyze the client’s strategic priorities (e.g., Omnichannel Growth, Margin Protection, Supply Chain Agility, and Sustainability) and map them to high\\-impact Celonis use cases.
* Target High\\-Impact Areas: Architect solutions that connect data across the value chain—moving beyond simple task automation to optimizing complex ecosystems like Demand Planning, Trade Promotions Management (TPM), Logistics, and Direct\\-to\\-Consumer (D2C) fulfillment.
* Build the Business Case: Construct robust, data\\-backed business cases that articulate the financial and operational impact of Process Intelligence (e.g., reducing Cost of Goods Sold, optimizing working capital, or improving On\\-Time In\\-Full \\[OTIF] delivery) to senior management.
* Win Expansion: Build demos and business cases, leveraging industry benchmarks and best practices in order to win new expansion opportunities.
* Assess Value: Undertake Value Assessments or Proof\\-of\\-Value Projects and communicate the value opportunity and strategic roadmap to C\\-Level executives.


**Realize Value**
* Drive Engagement Success: Lead the value workstream for pilots and implementations, ensuring the digital twin strategy effectively monitors process health in fast\\-paced, high\\-volume retail and consumer environments.
* Orchestrate Improvement: Guide customers on how to use Celonis to provide context to their AI agents, coordinating hand\\-offs between systems and teams in Order\\-to\\-Cash, Source\\-to\\-Pay, and Plan\\-to\\-Produce.
* Solve Systemic Challenges: Work cross\\-functionally to tackle difficult implementation hurdles, helping customers define standards for Retailer Compliance, master data governance, or supply network visibility.
* Facilitate Workshops: Run business value workshops and use Celonis to identify and qualify opportunities for process enhancement.
* Initiate Change: Derive improvement measures in core business functions and initiate improvement actions and enterprise\\-wide change initiatives.
* Present Results: Present results and realized value to senior management and C\\-level executives.


**Scale Value**
* Codify Best Practices: Turn our solutions into reusable assets and use cases for the broader Value Engineering team.
* Mentor \\& Enable: Act as a senior resource for the team, helping junior engineers understand CPG terminology, seasonality nuances, and retail stakeholder management.
* Product Feedback: Serve as a bridge between the customer and our Product teams, providing specific feedback on how to enhance our platform for the CPG vertical (e.g., specific requirements for Trade Spend visibility or SKU Rationalization).
* Manage the Journey: Responsible for the end\\-to\\-end customer value journey, landing, expanding, adoption, and renewing.
* Build Roadmaps: Build a strategic expansion roadmap for customers embedding the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform as a strategic business transformation platform in their organization.
* Drive Innovation: Provide feedback to our product development teams to enhance the Celonis platform and Apps based on new use cases.


**The qualifications you need:**
* Deep Industry Experience: 8\\+ years of relevant experience in Finance, Supply Chain, or Operations, ideally combining time at a CPG/FMCG company with Management Consulting or Sales Engineering.
* Domain Expertise: You possess granular knowledge of the CPG value chain, specifically in areas such as Demand \\& Supply Planning, Logistics, Trade Promotions, or Consumer/Retail Operations.
* Growth Mindset: Proven track record of managing the full customer lifecycle, with a demonstrated ability to land new accounts, expand footprint through strategic upselling, and drive long\\-term value to ensure high retention and organic advocacy.
* Value Realization Skills: You have a track record of identifying operational inefficiencies and driving them to resolution. You understand how to impact the P\\&L through process improvement and technology deployment.
* Technical Fluency: Good knowledge of Business Software/SaaS applications (e.g., SAP S/4HANA, Salesforce Consumer Goods Cloud, SAP IBP), and experience with data visualization, SQL, or Python is a strong plus.
* Stakeholder Management: Experience presenting to and working with senior stakeholders. You can navigate complex internal structures and clearly communicate value to non\\-technical audiences.
* Builder Mentality: You are comfortable working with ambiguity and setting your own direction within an account team to achieve the best results.
* Degree: Degree in Industrial/Business Engineering, Supply Chain Management, Informatics, Mathematics, or similar.


**What Celonis Can Offer You:**
* Pioneer Innovation: Work with the leading, award\\-winning process mining technology, shaping the future of business.
* Accelerate Your Growth: Benefit from clear career paths, internal mobility, a dedicated learning program, and mentorship opportunities.
* Receive Exceptional Benefits: Including generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (RSUs), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, dedicated volunteer days, and much more. Interns and working students explore your benefits here.
* Prioritize Your Well\\-being: Access to resources such as gym subsidies, counseling, and well\\-being programs.
* Connect and Belong: Find community and support through dedicated inclusion and belonging programs.
* Make Meaningful Impact: Be part of a company driven by strong values that guide everything we do: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.
* Collaborate Globally: Join a dynamic, international team of talented individuals.
* Empowered Environment: Contribute your ideas in an open culture with autonomous teams.


**About Us:**
 Celonis makes processes work for people, companies and the planet. The Celonis Process Intelligence Platform uses industry\\-leading process mining and AI technology and augments it with business context to give customers a living digital twin of their business operation. It’s system\\-agnostic and without bias, and provides everyone with a common language for understanding and improving businesses. Celonis enables its customers to continuously realize significant value across the top, bottom, and green line. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.
   

  

 Get familiar with the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform by watching this video.
   

  

**Celonis Inclusion Statement:**
 At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard \\- that's when creativity and innovation happen.
   

  

**Your Privacy:**
 Any information you submit to Celonis as part of your application will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices
   

  

 By submitting this application, you confirm that you agree to the storing and processing of your personal data by Celonis as described in our Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.

description:
**Description**
 The Senior Quality Auditor serves as a specialist who becomes the organization's deepest expert on 1\\-2 complex machine learning data workflows while maintaining hands\\-on audit execution. This role within the Machine Learning Data Operations job family leads Quality Audit Design (QuAD) teams for high\\-complexity workflows, handles the most ambiguous audit scenarios, and generates workflow\\-specific quality analysis that drives customer insights and workflow optimization.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 Workflow Expertise Development
   

  

* Become the organization's deepest expert on 1\\-2 assigned complex workflows through intensive pilot participation and continuous learning
* Participate in workflow pilots as an annotator to build foundational knowledge before production begins
* Develop comprehensive understanding of workflow conventions, edge cases, and quality requirements


 Team Leadership
   

  

* Lead QuAD teams of 3\\-5 Quality Auditors for Template 2 (High\\-Engagement Support) workflows
* Provide day\\-to\\-day leadership and make real\\-time quality decisions during iteration phases
* Handle escalations from team members and serve as the go\\-to expert for workflow\\-specific questions
* Mentor and develop Quality Auditor team members through coaching, feedback, and knowledge sharing


 Audit Execution
   

  

* Execute audits on the most ambiguous and complex scenarios, reducing escalations to Quality Specialists
* Maintain 60\\-70% hands\\-on audit execution to preserve expertise required for real\\-time decision\\-making
* Validate team audit decisions and ensure consistency across QuAD team members
* Support Template 1 workflows by auditing high\\-complexity scenarios requiring specialized judgment


 Analysis \\& Insights
   

  

* Generate workflow\\-specific deep dives and thematic analysis providing insights beyond conventions adherence scores
* Identify error patterns, convention evolution, and areas of ambiguity within assigned workflows
* Provide actionable recommendations for workflow optimization and quality improvement
* Partner with DSLs and customers on workflow\\-specific quality insights


 Strategic Collaboration
   

  

* Provide input to audit strategy design led by Quality Specialist I
* Collaborate with Quality Specialists on cross\\-workflow patterns and tactical improvements
* Participate in workflow design discussions with customers and stakeholders
* Support new\\-tool onboarding for operationalized and bootstrapped interfaces
* Track record of generating actionable insights from quality data.


**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent
* 2\\+ years of equivalent experience
* Experience working with machine learning data workflows or similar technical domains
* Hands\\-on experience in leadership and mentoring
* Strategic thinking about workflow optimization and process improvement
* Effective stakeholder communication skills with the ability to influence decision\\-makers and customers
* Domain expertise in STEM, language, or technical domains highly valued.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with explainable machine learning and artificial intelligence methodologies and tools
* Experience in leadership roles, overseeing teams conducting data analysis, process improvements, creative problem solving, and cross\\-functional collaboration
* Experience using data and metrics to drive actionable insights at scale
* Experience that includes strong analytical skills, attention to detail, and effective communication abilities
* Experience handling administrative details independently, while exercising good judgment in keeping team members adequately informed
* Familiarity with audit methodologies and quality frameworks
* Experience participating in pilot phases and workflow development.


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\\-we\\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
